title: Version 6.6
description: Current Genshin Impact version cycle with Phase 2 banners for Lohen and Mavuika.
verificationNote: PC Gamer identifies the current banner period as Version 6.6 Phase 2 and separately describes Version 6.6 livestream content. Version start is inferred from the existing project cycle and should be rechecked against official patch notes when available.
note: Version dates are date-level tracker boundaries, not exact server maintenance times.

title: Version 4.3

title: Version 3.0: A Sleepwalker's Confession
description: Current Zenless Zone Zero version cycle featuring Season 3 and debut agents Velina and Norma.

title: Version 1.1: Old Deep Water Dies, by Rising Tide It is Denied
description: First major Arknights: Endfield content update, introducing Version 1.1 and new 6-star Operators Tangtang and Rossi.
verificationNote: Source confirms Version 1.1 release time and new operators, but not the next version date. End date is retained as an estimated six-week version boundary and should be rechecked before publication.

title: Version 1.1

title: Season of Reckoning
description: Current Diablo IV season, launched with the Lord of Hatred expansion cycle. Blizzard has announced the next season, Season of Death Awakening, for a June 23, 2026 reveal livestream.
verificationNote: Start is from the existing official Blizzard source. GamesRadar reports Season 14 is announced for a June 23 livestream, but does not provide a replacement start date. End remains the existing estimated season boundary.
note: End date should be rechecked after Blizzard's June 23 Season 14 livestream.
